'''Emmer''', originally known as '''Umhul''' while it was part of [[Xim's empire]],<ref name="TEA" /> was a high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Nilgaard sector/Legends|Nilgaard sector]] that was covered in glowing grass and urban sprawls. The planet joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] prior to [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]]. [[Emmerian/Legends|Emmerian]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] vehicles inspired those built by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], such as the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]].

By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the planet had become an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-aligned [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] were able to [[Battle of Emmer (4 ABY)|defeat]] Imperial forces there. However, [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] later took control of the planet. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Emmer (8 ABY)|freed]] the planet during the [[Post–Zsinj campaigns]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8.5 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />
